content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION  
LEGAL DIVISION  
428 J STREET SUITE #800  
SACRAMENTO, CALIFORNIA 95814

DEAR MR. JOHN WALLACE:

I AM WRITING TO ASK FOR CORRABORATION TO OUR TELEPHONE CONVERSATION OF OCTOBER 22, 1990. MY CANDIDATE, JOHN WOZNIAK, CAN SHARE THE BULK MAILING PERMIT WITH A FELLOW CANDIDATE, CLINT HARPER, BOTH RUNNING FOR A SEAT ON THE MOORPARK CITY COUNCIL, CLINT HARPER AS MAYOR. IT IS MY UNDERSTANDING THAT LAWS HAVE CHANGED SINCE CAMPAIGNS HAVE BEGUN AND THE TRANSFER OF FUNDS, BETWEEN CANDIDATES, IS ALLOWABLE, SINCE WE ARE NOT INVOLVED IN A LEGISLATIVE CAMPAIGN. THANK YOU FOR YOUR ASSISTANCE.

SINCERELY,

[Signature]

DEE TALLEY  
CAMPAIGN TREASURER  
FRIENDS TO ELECT JOHN WOZNIAK  
306 McFADDEN AVENUE  
MOORPARK, CALIFORNIA 93021  
805 529-4152
